shellCommands.command:
pwd && rg --files -g '!node_modules' | head -80 && printf '
--- package ---
' && sed -n '1,220p' package.json && printf '
--- status ---
' && git status --short

find src -type f -maxdepth 4 -print | sort && printf '\n--- event/timing references ---\n' && grep -RInE "touchstart|mouseenter|mouseover|scroll|resize|showDelay|delayShow|setTimeout|anchor" src --include='*.ts' --include='*.tsx' --include='*.js' --include='*.jsx' | head -240
